name: Determinism
description: Visual and audio assets can be reproduced from recorded parameters (seed, prompt version, model, aspect, chain). If determinism is not promised, this bar is N/A.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate whether promised assets are reproducible. Check that parameters are logged sufficiently. If determinism is not promised for an asset, skip this check for that asset.

criteria.name: parameter_logging
criteria.description: All parameters needed to reproduce the asset are logged: seed, prompt, model version, aspect ratio, processing chain.

bad: No record of model version used

criteria.name: deferred_review
criteria.description: Plan-only items (no execution yet) are marked deferred with constraints reviewed.

good: Art plan marked deferred:illustration with style constraints noted
Audio plan deferred with reviewed parameters
bad: Unexecuted plan with no deferral marking

criteria.name: convergence_reflection
criteria.description: When branches converge, the next scene's first paragraph reflects the entering state with at least one conditioned affordance.

good: At least one element is state-dependent

failure_guidance: Regenerate assets with proper logging or explicitly accept as non-deterministic. For plan-only items, ensure deferral is marked and constraints are reviewed. Adjust constraints with Style Lead if plan contradicts style.
